# Jonathan Shields

> Software Developer and Mainframe Engineer based in Queens, NY. Currently working as a Mainframe Operator at The Cigna Group and apprenticing under Dr. Cameron Seay at Emma Apprenticeship. I focus on mainframe technology (COBOL, JCL, HLASM), DevOps, and bridging legacy systems with modern infrastructure.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.jonathanshields.dev/): Profile, recent videos, blog posts, and projects
- [Resume](https://www.jonathanshields.dev/resume/): Full professional experience and skills
- [Blog](https://www.jonathanshields.dev/blog/): Technical writing and personal thoughts
- [Videos](https://www.jonathanshields.dev/videos/): YouTube tutorials on mainframe topics
- [Projects](https://www.jonathanshields.dev/projects/): Software projects and experiments

## Skills

Programming Languages: Python, C++, Rust, Bash, Golang, SQL, Java, COBOL, HLASM/Assembly, REXX, JCL
Technologies: Vim, Linux, Git, Docker, Mainframe (TSO/ISPF, SDSF, z/VM), Zowe
